message: We actually did it. This one's been sitting in my head all week and I think - I really think - people are going to feel that bite-through moment.
The lamination layers actually do the work here - when someone bites through, they're experiencing what Margaret spent hours perfecting, not what we told them to feel.
That's exactly it - we got out of the way and let the work speak for itself.
Yeah - and that's what makes it hold up. The copy doesn't have to carry everything when the thing itself is honest.
That's the whole thing right there - technique doing the talking instead of us drowning it in explanation.
It's live. We trusted the work and it actually held. That's rare - I'm going to remember this one.
